description.description: Specifies a user-friendly description of the workload identity pool, providing context about its purpose or usage.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the workload identity pool is disabled; set to true to disable the pool, preventing new identities from being created.

display_name.description: Specifies the user-friendly name for the workload identity pool, which must be unique within the project and can include alphanumeric characters, spaces, and special characters.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations within the workload identity pool.

workload_identity_pool_id.description: Unique identifier for the workload identity pool, must be globally unique and comply with Google Cloud resource naming conventions.
